scripts.build: npm run server:build && npm run client:build
scripts.docker:smoke: npm run docker:wait && curl -f http://localhost:3000/version && bash scripts/smoke.sh http://localhost:3000
scripts.docker:smoke:room: npm run docker:wait && bash scripts/smoke-room.sh http://localhost:3000
scripts.docker:check-runtime: docker compose run --rm --no-deps yourvoice sh -lc 'test ! -x node_modules/.bin/vite && echo "[ok] vite não está no runtime" || echo "[warn] vite ainda está no runtime"; id'
